underlying_goal: Implement a complete SIA DC-09 message validation layer in Go for alarm receiver ticket AR-18, including CRC, length, timestamp, account, and required fields validators with comprehensive tests
friction_detail: User had multiple Go syntax struggles (arrows vs dots, string conversion, append, time.Since sign), a design debate about parser vs validator responsibility for CRC/length checks, and a sub-agent caught a swapped CRC expected/actual bug.
brief_summary: User built a complete SIA DC-09 validation layer across multiple Go files with 40+ tests, resolved a design debate and a real bug caught by sub-agents, and completed the Jira ticket end-to-end.
